intro: Viborgia purpurea, also known as Vervain, is a perennial plant belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering relief from anxiety, insomnia, and gastrointestinal issues due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Vervain include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and volatile oils, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In herbal medicine, Vervain is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for stress relief, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
